title: polygala crotalarioides
intro: Polygala crotalarioides, also known as Yuan Zhi or Dragon Beard, is a type of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Polygala crotalarioides include improving respiratory function, reducing anxiety and stress, and enhancing overall well-being. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, capsules, and infusions for the treatment of various health conditions.
